channel.title: Star Trek Relaunch Book Club on Trek Relaunch Book Club
channel.description: Recent content in Star Trek Relaunch Book Club on Trek Relaunch Book Club

item.title: (1) TNG: Death In Winter
item.description:
DNA thieves, Beverly Crusher’s maiden name and a few guest appearances from the USS Stargazer. Can author Michael Jan Friedman maneuver the Star Trek TNG books into this new era?

Spoilers ahead!

item.title: (2) Titan: Taking Wing
item.description:
Riker finally gets that 4th pip and has left The Enterprise to captain The Titan. Can this book of new diverse characters find its feet and deliver a compelling read?

Spoilers ahead!

item.title: Sales data
item.description:
Our patented tripolymer metagenic book sales predictor

How we calculate a books commercial success (E.g. number of sales)

Book sales are notoriously difficult to find online. In fact it’s pretty much impossible.

Instead we use a basic spreadsheet for tracking the number of reviews a book receieves on Amazon & Goodreads.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Your Name Email Address An email address is required. Message
